layers.name: knowledge
layers.description: Graphify graph, wiki, and raw ingestion sources

layers.name: contracts
layers.description: Harness schemas, ADRs, and governance docs

boundaries.reason: Skills are NL-first; pi loads extensions — skills must not depend on extension modules
Prompts configure agents; they must not import extension implementation code
Knowledge graph output must not depend on harness runtime extensions
Contracts are data-only JSON schemas; extensions implement behavior
CLI scripts stay independent of skill markdown
